hero.headline: Santorini, Without the Logistics.
hero.sub: Mercedes-Benz transfers and curated tours of the island. Fixed prices, meet-and-greet service, available 24/7.

why.heading: Fixed Prices. Mercedes Fleet. Every Day of the Year.

items.title: Fixed Prices
items.body: The price you're quoted is the price you pay. No surge pricing, no luggage surcharges.

items.title: 24/7 Service
items.body: Late-night ferry, 5am flight, 2pm nap-time pickup — we dispatch whenever you need us.

items.title: Licensed Drivers
items.body: Every driver is professionally licensed, insured, and speaks fluent English.

items.title: Card Payments
items.body: All major cards accepted. No processing fees. Invoice on request.

tours.heading: Four Ways to See the Island
tours.sub: Pair any of these with a transfer and we handle the day end-to-end.

fleet.heading: Our Mercedes-Benz Lineup
fleet.sub: Every vehicle climate-controlled, newly maintained, and fitted for comfort on Santorini's narrow roads.

hero.headline: Transfers Handled, Arrivals Felt.
hero.sub: Airport, port, hotel, wedding, or an all-day driver. Same fleet, same drivers, same fixed prices.

services.title: Airport Transfers
services.body: Meet-and-greet at JTR arrivals, luggage assistance, direct to your accommodation. Flight-tracked — no charge for reasonable delays.

services.title: Port Transfers
services.body: Coordinated with cruise arrivals at Athinios. Driver waits portside with a sign. Luggage and buggy room included.

services.title: Hotel-to-Hotel
services.body: Changing properties mid-stay? We move you and your bags door-to-door, same-day or scheduled.

services.title: Wedding Transfers
services.body: Full fleet available for wedding parties — coordinated timing, ribbons optional, group bookings discounted.

services.title: Beach & Evening
services.body: Daytime beach runs, evening club transfers, late-night returns. Safe, sober, on-time.

services.title: 24-Hour Driver
services.body: Your dedicated driver and Mercedes for the day. Set the itinerary as you go, stop where you want, no meter running.
